description: Product Description Stepace Round Heavy Duty Shoe Laces for Outdoor Hiking Work Boots, Durable Round Laces for Boots Shoes Round Robust Boots Laces for Hiking Boots, Work Shoes, Walking Boots, Safety Boots, Steel Toe Cap Boots, Hunting Boots, Trekking Boots Built in Premium Quality - Made from polyester, with an exquisite box packaging for every two pairs of shoe laces. The material is soft and moderate with fine knitting, and the durability is excellent. Various styles to choose from Round laces Diameter: 4mm (stripe, low density) 4.5mm (dots, high density) shoelaces, 18 styles to choose from. Material of the round robust shoelaces Made from polyester, woven by high-quality silk thread makes the laces robust as well as durable and helps you conquer the toughest outdoor conditions. Suitable Occasions Round replacement boot shoe strings fit for hiking, mountaineering, running, climbing working and outdoor exercising. How to Choose the Right Boot Laces Size? The length of sturdy shoe lace depends on the number of the eyelets or the method of tying the laces. You can refer to the size suggestion method above, then find the best length. If you prefer longer length, then choose a longer one. Stepace round hiking work safety boot shoe laces Stepace 2 Pairs Flat Fluffy Shoe Laces for Sneakers 10mm Wide Thick Fuzzy Sho...
